fato_historico: 1944: World War II: Hideki Tōjō resigns as Prime Minister of Japan because of numerous setbacks in the war effort.
energia_do_dia: The cosmos invites you to release heavy burdens that no longer serve your spirit. Much like the wisdom gained from knowing when to step back and prioritize peace over conflict, today may be an ideal time to retreat into your shell for rejuvenation. Your intuition is a gift; consider using it to navigate your emotional landscape with grace and gentle kindness.
frase_do_dia: True power lies in the wisdom of knowing when to begin anew.
significado_numero: Represents the path toward inner wisdom and the cycles of growth.
conselho: Trust your heart and allow yourself the space to breathe and heal today.
